fields.label: Profile Name
fields.description: A short name for this profile, e.g. 'Fit-out Standard BOQ', 'Signage Quick Quote', 'Shop Drawing Costing'.

fields.label: Industry / Use-case
fields.description: Free-text label for the industry or use-case this profile is designed for. Purely descriptive — does not affect logic.

fields.label: Model Name
fields.description: Leave blank to inherit the global model from AI Estimation Settings.

fields.label: Prompt Mode
fields.description: fully_custom: System Prompt below controls everything — the AI role AND the output shape. custom_with_builtin_schema: System Prompt sets the AI role; the selected Schema Type's JSON structure is automatically appended. strict_builtin: Uses only the built-in schema for the selected Schema Type, ignoring the System Prompt field entirely.

fields.label: Schema Type
fields.options:
generic_line_items
trade_boq
shop_drawing_items
cost_breakdown
roomwise_boq
assetwise_estimate
fields.description: Output structure expected from the AI. Applied when prompt_mode is custom_with_builtin_schema or strict_builtin.

fields.label: Workflow Type
fields.description: Controls how inputs are processed. document_based_boq: extracts text + renders vision from every file (default). simple_text_estimation: ignores file attachments, uses only the typed scope. vision_first: renders all PDFs as images, skips text extraction. drawing_takeoff_then_pricing: two-step — runs a takeoff pass first, feeds the result into the pricing pass.

fields.label: Pricing Mode
fields.description: ai_generated_rates: AI provides all unit rates. manual_review_only: AI generates item structure only; all rates are flagged for manual entry. rate_card_with_ai_fallback: rate card lookup first, AI fills gaps.

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: The full system instruction sent to the AI for estimations using this profile. Must instruct the model to return valid JSON. Ignored when prompt_mode is strict_builtin.

fields.label: Specialized Prompts
fields.description: Override the built-in prompts for secondary AI features (commercial review, drawing takeoff, item detail). Leave blank to use the global settings or built-in generic defaults.

fields.label: Rule Toggles
fields.description: When enabled, these rules are injected into the AI prompt (in custom_with_builtin_schema mode) and also applied as post-generation validation checks.

fields.label: Require Material / Service Split
fields.description: Each item must have type = Material or Service. Items missing this are flagged as Schema Error.

fields.label: Require Room / Zone
fields.description: Each item must have a room_zone value. Items missing this are flagged as Needs Review.

fields.label: Require Project Area
fields.description: A non-zero project_area_sqft must be present in the AI response. A warning is added to the audit log if missing.

fields.label: Minimum Line Item Count
fields.description: If the AI returns fewer items than this number, a validation warning is added to the audit log. Set to 0 to disable.

fields.label: Min Confidence to Accept
fields.description: Items with AI confidence below this are flagged Needs Review. Range 0.0–1.0.

fields.label: Flag Items with Missing Fields
fields.description: Items missing qty, uom, or description are flagged Needs Review.

fields.label: Item Description Style
fields.description: Controls how verbose the AI's item descriptions are. brief = one short phrase. standard = sentence with key spec. detailed = full spec + dimensions. specification_grade = full commercial spec suitable for QS sign-off.

fields.label: Include File Source Reference
fields.description: When enabled, the AI is instructed to record the source file name and page number in each item's remarks / source_reference field.

fields.label: Enforce File Scope Only
fields.description: When enabled, the AI must only include items that are explicitly visible or directly implied in the attached files. Disabling allows professional judgement (recommended for fit-out).

fields.label: Pricing Context / Rate Schedule
fields.description: Paste your company's rate schedule here. The AI will use these rates as primary anchors. Leave blank to rely on AI's built-in market knowledge.
